title: Media Buy Features
description: Optional media-buy protocol features. Used in capability declarations (seller declares support) and product filters (buyer requires support). If a seller declares a feature as true, they MUST honor requests using that feature.

inline_creative_management.description: Supports creatives provided inline in create_media_buy and update_media_buy package payloads. This flag does not imply a creative library: an inline-only seller can accept packages[].creatives without advertising sync_creatives, list_creatives, or reusable creative IDs.

property_list_filtering.description: Honors property_list parameter in get_products to filter results to buyer-approved properties

catalog_management.description: Supports sync_catalogs task for catalog feed management with platform review and approval

committed_metrics_supported.description: Seller has per-package snapshot infrastructure for the reporting contract. When true, the seller MUST populate `package.committed_metrics` on committed `create_media_buy` responses where `confirmed_at` is non-null, MUST omit `package.committed_metrics` while `confirmed_at` is null for a provisional buy, and MUST honor append-only mid-flight metric additions via `update_media_buy`. The unified `committed_metrics` array (per the metric-accountability design) covers both standard and vendor-defined metric entries, so a single flag is load-bearing. Buyers filtering on this flag are detecting 'this seller can stamp the reporting contract,' which closes the audit gap from PR #3510 where absence of `committed_metrics` was indistinguishable between 'didn't snapshot' and 'snapshot infrastructure not implemented.'
